-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Kristiansand%';

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, ssbid1000m, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(geom,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km
WHERE ST_Intersects(ST_Transform(geom,32633), (SELECT ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('"MULTIPOLYGON(((9.4 58.0,9.4 58.1,9.5 58.1,9.5 58.0,9.4 58.0)))"'::json),4326),32633)));

SELECT kommunenummer, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
